allow: PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "python" -ArgumentList "-m", "http.server", "8080" -WorkingDirectory "c:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\gilam-yuvish-crm" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Error: $_" })
